design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Calm authority, Premium intelligence, Warm & Human
core_values: Human warmth in a technical world

layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned for text, Centered for Hero specific elements if needed for balance

logo.description: Asymmetric infinity symbol. Left loop larger (portfolio view), right loop smaller (individual account). Stroke: Teal #00D4C8.

hero.style: Centered with massive typography. Background: Signal Node SVG (network graph style).
hero.content: Headline + Subheadline + CTA + Signal Card Mockup
hero.mockup: Stylized Account Insight Card. NOT a dashboard. Use HTML/CSS to build a card with a 'Signal' score and key metrics.

social_proof.logos: Use react-icons for Gmail (SiGmail), Calendar (SiGooglecalendar), Fathom (SiFathom? or text), Outlook (SiMicrosoftoutlook).

problem_section.style: 3 Vignette Cards. Horizontal scroll or Grid. Scroll-driven animations.

cards.title: The Black Box
cards.desc: Customer health is a mystery until renewal.

cards.title: The Fire Drill
cards.desc: Reactive scrambling when accounts go red.

cards.title: The Silo
cards.desc: Data trapped in emails and calls, invisible to the team.

reframe_section.animation: Word-by-word fade in on scroll. Opacity 0.2 -> 1.0.

how_it_works.visual: Animated SVG connector line linking the 3 steps.

stats.animation: Counter up animation when in view.

founder_video.style: Placeholder for video. Use a nice gradient border container with a 'Play' button icon.

cta_final.style: Denser signal graph background. Large 'Start Free' button.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use mostly solid dark colors. Use subtle radial gradients for glows behind cards or hero text.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 for Nav and floating cards.

types: Path Drawing (for How it Works connector)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion lucide-react react-icons clsx tailwind-merge`
Configure Tailwind with the specific colors (#0A0F1E, #00D4C8, #F59E0B) and fonts.
Import fonts in `index.css` via Google Fonts URL.
Create the 'Signal Card' using pure CSS/Tailwind. It should look like a high-tech trading card or notification.
Ensure 'Data Test IDs' are added to all interactive elements.
Do NOT use stock photos for people (except the founder placeholder). Use abstract data visualizations or UI mockups.
Ensure the 'Signal Node' background is an SVG pattern that is subtle and dark.
For the 'Reframe' section, use `useScroll` and `useTransform` from framer-motion to create the text reveal effect.

universal_guidelines.do_not_center_everything: Use left alignment for body text. Center only big headlines.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use `gap-8` or `gap-12` minimum between grid items.
universal_guidelines.typography_hierarchy: Contrast is key. Headings = Syne (Bold). Body = Jakarta (Regular). Data = Mono (JetBrains).
universal_guidelines.mobile_responsiveness: Stack everything on mobile. Reduce padding to `p-6`.
